from sqlalchemy.orm import sessionmaker, declarative_base

SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL = "sqlite:///./saas_quota.db"

engine = create_engine(
    SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL,
    connect_args={"check_same_thread": False},
)

SessionLocal = sessionmaker(autocommit=False, autoflush=False, bind=engine)

Base = declarative_base()


def get_db():
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        yield db
    finally:
        db.close()


def reset_db():
    Base.metadata.drop_all(bind=engine)
    Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)

{"content":"import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timezone

from sqlalchemy import (
    Column,
    String,
    Integer,
    Float,
    DateTime,
    Text,
    ForeignKey,
    UniqueConstraint,
    Index,
)
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship

from app.database import Base


def _utcnow():
    return datetime.now(timezone.utc)


class QuotaBatch(Base):
    __tablename__ = "quota_batches"

    id = Column(String, primary_key=True, default=lambda: uuid.uuid4().hex)
    batch_no = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False, index=True)
    source_channel = Column(String, nullable=False)
    action = Column(String, nullable=False)
    review_opinion = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    rule_version = Column(String, nullable=False)
    operator = Column(String, nullable=False)
    status = Column(String, nullable=False, default="pending")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow, onupdate=_utcnow)

    details = relationship(
        "QuotaDetail", back_populates="batch", cascade="all, delete-orphan"
    )
    audit_logs = relationship(
        "AuditLog", back_populates="batch", cascade="all, delete-orphan"
    )

    __table_args__ = (Index("ix_batch_no_source", "batch_no", "source_channel"),)


class QuotaDetail(Base):
    __tablename__ = "quota_details"

    id = Column(String, primary_key=True, default=lambda: uuid.uuid4().hex)
    batch_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("quota_batches.id"), nullable=False)
    tenant_id = Column(String, nullable=False)
    quota_type = Column(String, nullable=False)
    quota_key = Column(String, nullable=False)
    requested_value = Column(Float, nullable=False)
    current_value = Column(Float, nullable=True, default=0.0)
    unit = Column(String, nullable=True, default="count")
    disposition = Column(String, nullable=True)
    risk_label = Column(String, nullable=True)
    failure_reason = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    rule_version = Column(String, nullable=True)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow, onupdate=_utcnow)

    batch = relationship("QuotaBatch", back_populates="details")

    __table_args__ = (
        UniqueConstraint(
            "batch_id", "tenant_id", "quota_type", "quota_key",
            name="uq_detail_batch_tenant_quota",
        ),
        Index("ix_detail_tenant_type", "tenant_id", "quota_type"),
    )


class AuditLog(Base):
    __tablename__ = "audit_logs"

    id = Column(String, primary_key=True, default=lambda: uuid.uuid4().hex)
    batch_id = Column(String, ForeignKey("quota_batches.id"), nullable=False)
    action_taken = Column(String, nullable=False)
    detail_id = Column(String, nullable=True)
    message = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    operator = Column(String, nullable=False)
    rule_version = Column(String, nullable=False)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow)

    batch = relationship("QuotaBatch", back_populates="audit_logs")

    __table_args__ = (Index("ix_audit_batch", "batch_id"),)


class RuleVersion(Base):
    __tablename__ = "rule_versions"

    id = Column(String, primary_key=True, default=lambda: uuid.uuid4().hex)
    version = Column(String, unique=True, nullable=False)

    conflict_detection_enabled = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1)
    is_active = Column(Integer, nullable=False, default=1)
    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=_utcnow)

{"content":"from typing import Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, model_validator
from enum import Enum


class SourceChannel(str, Enum):
    ADMIN_PORTAL = "admin_portal"
    API_DIRECT = "api_direct"
    MIGRATION = "migration"
    AUTO_SCALE = "auto_scale"


class ProcessingAction(str, Enum):
    APPLY = "apply"
    ADJUST = "adjust"
    RELEASE = "release"
    LOCK = "lock"
    UNLOCK = "unlock"


class Disposition(str, Enum):
    PROCESSABLE = "processable"
    NEEDS_SUPPLEMENT = "needs_supplement"
    LOCKED = "locked"
    FAILED = "failed"


class RiskLabel(str, Enum):
    NORMAL = "normal"
    WARNING = "warning"
    HIGH_RISK = "high_risk"
    CONFLICT = "conflict"


class QuotaDetailRequest(BaseModel):
    tenant_id: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="租户ID")
    quota_type: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="配额类型(如storage/users/api_calls)")
    quota_key: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="配额键(如standard/premium)")
    requested_value: float = Field(..., gt=0, description="申请值")
    current_value: float = Field(0.0, ge=0, description="当前值")
    unit: str = Field("count", description="单位")

    @model_validator(mode="after")
    def validate_values(self):
        if self.requested_value <= 0:
            raise ValueError("requested_value must be positive")
        return self


class QuotaBatchRequest(BaseModel):
    batch_no: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="批次号(幂等键)")
    details: list[QuotaDetailRequest] = Field(..., min_length=1, description="明细项列表")
    source_channel: SourceChannel = Field(..., description="来源渠道")
    action: ProcessingAction = Field(..., description="处理动作")
    review_opinion: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="复核意见")
    operator: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="操作人")


class QuotaDetailResponse(BaseModel):
    tenant_id: str
    quota_type: str
    quota_key: str
    requested_value: float
    current_value: float
    unit: str
    disposition: Disposition
    risk_label: RiskLabel
    failure_reason: Optional[str] = None
    rule_version: str

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}


class QuotaBatchResponse(BaseModel):
    batch_no: str
    source_channel: str
    action: str
    review_opinion: Optional[str] = None
    rule_version: str
    operator: str
    summary: "BatchSummary"
    details: list[QuotaDetailResponse]
    audit_trail: list["AuditEntry"]

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}


class BatchSummary(BaseModel):
    total: int
    processable: int
    needs_supplement: int
    locked: int
    failed: int


class AuditEntry(BaseModel):
    action_taken: str
    detail_id: Optional[str] = None
    message: Optional[str] = None
    operator: str
    rule_version: str

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}


class ErrorResponse(BaseModel):
    error_code: str
    message: str
    detail: Optional[str] = None


QuotaBatchResponse.model_rebuild()

{"content":"import json
import uuid
from typing import Optional

from sqlalchemy.orm import Session

from app.models import QuotaBatch, QuotaDetail, AuditLog
from app.schemas import (
    QuotaBatchRequest,
    QuotaBatchResponse,
    QuotaDetailResponse,
    BatchSummary,
    AuditEntry,
    Disposition,
    RiskLabel,
)
from app.rules import RuleEngine


class QuotaService:
    def __init__(self, db: Session):
        self.db = db
        self.rule_engine = RuleEngine(db)

    def process_batch(self, request: QuotaBatchRequest) -> QuotaBatchResponse:
        existing = (
            self.db.query(QuotaBatch)
            .filter(QuotaBatch.batch_no == request.batch_no)
            .first()
        )
        if existing:
            return self._build_response(existing)

        rule_version = self.rule_engine.current_version

        batch = QuotaBatch(
            id=uuid.uuid4().hex,
            batch_no=request.batch_no,
            source_channel=request.source_channel.value,
            action=request.action.value,
            review_opinion=request.review_opinion,
            rule_version=rule_version,
            operator=request.operator,
            status="processed",
        )
        self.db.add(batch)
        self.db.flush()

        detail_responses: list[QuotaDetailResponse] = []
        for item in request.details:
            result = self.rule_engine.evaluate_detail(
                batch_id=batch.id,
                tenant_id=item.tenant_id,
                quota_type=item.quota_type,
                quota_key=item.quota_key,
                requested_value=item.requested_value,
                current_value=item.current_value,
            )

            detail = QuotaDetail(
                id=uuid.uuid4().hex,
                batch_id=batch.id,
                tenant_id=item.tenant_id,
                quota_type=item.quota_type,
                quota_key=item.quota_key,
                requested_value=item.requested_value,
                current_value=item.current_value,
                unit=item.unit,
                disposition=result["disposition"],
                risk_label=result["risk_label"],
                failure_reason=result["failure_reason"],
                rule_version=rule_version,
            )
            self.db.add(detail)
            self.db.flush()

            self._record_audit(
                batch_id=batch.id,
                detail_id=detail.id,
                action_taken=f"evaluate:{result['disposition']}",
                message=(
                    result["failure_reason"]
                    if result["failure_reason"]
                    else f"配额评估通过: {result['disposition']}"
                ),
                operator=request.operator,
                rule_version=rule_version,
            )

            detail_responses.append(
                QuotaDetailResponse(
                    tenant_id=item.tenant_id,
                    quota_type=item.quota_type,
                    quota_key=item.quota_key,
                    requested_value=item.requested_value,
                    current_value=item.current_value,
                    unit=item.unit,
                    disposition=Disposition(result["disposition"]),
                    risk_label=RiskLabel(result["risk_label"]),
                    failure_reason=result["failure_reason"],
                    rule_version=rule_version,
                )
            )

        self._record_audit(
            batch_id=batch.id,
            action_taken="batch_complete",
            message=f"批次处理完成, 共{len(detail_responses)}条明细",
            operator=request.operator,
            rule_version=rule_version,
        )

        self.db.commit()

        return self._assemble_response(batch, detail_responses)

    def _record_audit(
        self,
        batch_id: str,
        action_taken: str,
        operator: str,
        rule_version: str,
        detail_id: Optional[str] = None,
        message: Optional[str] = None,
    ):
        log = AuditLog(
            id=uuid.uuid4().hex,
            batch_id=batch_id,
            detail_id=detail_id,
            action_taken=action_taken,
            message=message,
            operator=operator,
            rule_version=rule_version,
        )
        self.db.add(log)
        self.db.flush()

    def _build_response(self, batch: QuotaBatch) -> QuotaBatchResponse:
        details = (
            self.db.query(QuotaDetail)
            .filter(QuotaDetail.batch_id == batch.id)
            .all()
        )
        detail_responses = [
            QuotaDetailResponse(
                tenant_id=d.tenant_id,
                quota_type=d.quota_type,
                quota_key=d.quota_key,
                requested_value=d.requested_value,
                current_value=d.current_value,
                unit=d.unit,
                disposition=Disposition(d.disposition),
                risk_label=RiskLabel(d.risk_label),
                failure_reason=d.failure_reason,
                rule_version=d.rule_version,
            )
            for d in details
        ]
        return self._assemble_response(batch, detail_responses)

    def _assemble_response(
        self, batch: QuotaBatch, detail_responses: list[QuotaDetailResponse]
    ) -> QuotaBatchResponse:
        summary = BatchSummary(
            total=len(detail_responses),
            processable=sum(
                1 for d in detail_responses if d.disposition == Disposition.PROCESSABLE
            ),
            needs_supplement=sum(
                1
                for d in detail_responses
                if d.disposition == Disposition.NEEDS_SUPPLEMENT
            ),
            locked=sum(
                1 for d in detail_responses if d.disposition == Disposition.LOCKED
            ),
            failed=sum(
                1 for d in detail_responses if d.disposition == Disposition.FAILED
            ),
        )

        audit_logs = (
            self.db.query(AuditLog)
            .filter(AuditLog.batch_id == batch.id)
            .order_by(AuditLog.created_at)
            .all()
        )
        audit_entries = [
            AuditEntry(
                action_taken=a.action_taken,
                detail_id=a.detail_id,
                message=a.message,
                operator=a.operator,
                rule_version=a.rule_version,
            )
            for a in audit_logs
        ]

        return QuotaBatchResponse(
            batch_no=batch.batch_no,
            source_channel=batch.source_channel,
            action=batch.action,
            review_opinion=batch.review_opinion,
            rule_version=batch.rule_version,
            operator=batch.operator,
            summary=summary,
            details=detail_responses,
            audit_trail=audit_entries,
        )

from fastapi import FastAPI, Depends, HTTPException

app = FastAPI(
    title="SaaS租户配额API",

    version="1.0.0",

def _seed_default_rule():
    from app.database import SessionLocal
    db = SessionLocal()
    try:
        existing = db.query(RuleVersion).filter(RuleVersion.version == "v1.0.0").first()
        if not existing:
            import json
            rule = RuleVersion(
                version="v1.0.0",
                description="默认规则版本",
                max_quota_overage_pct=0.2,
                locked_tenant_patterns=json.dumps(["LOCKED_*"]),
                requires_supplement_types=json.dumps(["storage", "api_calls"]),
                conflict_detection_enabled=1,
                is_active=1,
            )
            db.add(rule)
            db.commit()
    finally:
        db.close()


@app.post(
    "/api/v1/quota/batch",
    response_model=QuotaBatchResponse,
    responses={400: {"model": ErrorResponse}, 409: {"model": ErrorResponse}},
    summary="提交租户配额批次",
)
def submit_quota_batch(
    request: QuotaBatchRequest,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
):

    result = service.process_batch(request)
    return result


@app.get(
    "/api/v1/quota/batch/{batch_no}",
    response_model=QuotaBatchResponse,
    responses={404: {"model": ErrorResponse}},
    summary="查询批次结果",
)
def get_quota_batch(batch_no: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    from app.models import QuotaBatch
    batch = db.query(QuotaBatch).filter(QuotaBatch.batch_no == batch_no).first()
    if not batch:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail=f"批次{batch_no}不存在")
    service = QuotaService(db)
    return service._build_response(batch)


@app.get(
    "/api/v1/quota/audit/{batch_no}",

    summary="查询批次审计日志",
)
def get_audit_logs(batch_no: str, db: Session = Depends(get_db)):
    from app.models import QuotaBatch, AuditLog
    batch = db.query(QuotaBatch).filter(QuotaBatch.batch_no == batch_no).first()

    logs = (

            "detail_id": log.detail_id,

            "operator": log.operator,
            "rule_version": log.rule_version,
            "created_at": log.created_at.isoformat() if log.created_at else None,
        }
        for log in logs
    ]

{"content":"from __future__ import annotations
from typing import Optional, List
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, model_validator
from enum import Enum


class SourceChannel(str, Enum):
    ADMIN_PORTAL = "admin_portal"
    API_DIRECT = "api_direct"
    MIGRATION = "migration"
    AUTO_SCALE = "auto_scale"


class ProcessingAction(str, Enum):
    APPLY = "apply"
    ADJUST = "adjust"
    RELEASE = "release"
    LOCK = "lock"
    UNLOCK = "unlock"


class Disposition(str, Enum):
    PROCESSABLE = "processable"
    NEEDS_SUPPLEMENT = "needs_supplement"
    LOCKED = "locked"
    FAILED = "failed"


class RiskLabel(str, Enum):
    NORMAL = "normal"
    WARNING = "warning"
    HIGH_RISK = "high_risk"
    CONFLICT = "conflict"


class QuotaDetailRequest(BaseModel):
    tenant_id: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="租户ID")
    quota_type: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="配额类型(如storage/users/api_calls)")
    quota_key: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="配额键(如standard/premium)")
    requested_value: float = Field(..., gt=0, description="申请值")
    current_value: float = Field(0.0, ge=0, description="当前值")
    unit: str = Field("count", description="单位")

    @model_validator(mode="after")
    def validate_values(self):
        if self.requested_value <= 0:
            raise ValueError("requested_value must be positive")
        return self


class QuotaBatchRequest(BaseModel):
    batch_no: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="批次号(幂等键)")
    details: List[QuotaDetailRequest] = Field(..., min_length=1, description="明细项列表")
    source_channel: SourceChannel = Field(..., description="来源渠道")
    action: ProcessingAction = Field(..., description="处理动作")
    review_opinion: Optional[str] = Field(None, description="复核意见")
    operator: str = Field(..., min_length=1, description="操作人")


class QuotaDetailResponse(BaseModel):
    tenant_id: str
    quota_type: str
    quota_key: str
    requested_value: float
    current_value: float
    unit: str
    disposition: Disposition
    risk_label: RiskLabel
    failure_reason: Optional[str] = None
    rule_version: str

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}


class BatchSummary(BaseModel):
    total: int
    processable: int
    needs_supplement: int
    locked: int
    failed: int


class AuditEntry(BaseModel):
    action_taken: str
    detail_id: Optional[str] = None
    message: Optional[str] = None
    operator: str
    rule_version: str

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}


class QuotaBatchResponse(BaseModel):
    batch_no: str
    source_channel: str
    action: str
    review_opinion: Optional[str] = None
    rule_version: str
    operator: str
    summary: BatchSummary
    details: List[QuotaDetailResponse]
    audit_trail: List[AuditEntry]

    model_config = {"from_attributes": True}


class ErrorResponse(BaseModel):
    error_code: str
    message: str
    detail: Optional[str] = None

冲突测试使用了 `requested_value=200, current_value=80`，超额率为 150%，但由于冲突优先，它应该会因冲突而失败。然而，超额检查发生在冲突检查之后。等等——实际上规则引擎首先检查锁定，然后检查冲突，然后检查补充类型，最后检查超额。所以冲突检测应该优先于超额。我来验证一下：

查看 `evaluate_detail`：锁定 → 冲突 → 补充类型 → 超额 → 可处理。这是正确的优先级。由于冲突在超额之前被检测到，`requested_value=200` 是可以的。好的。

**SaaS租户配额API** 已完成实现，全部 **30 个验收测试通过**。以下是架构和验收要点总结：

---

## 项目结构

| 文件 | 职责 |
|------|------|
| [schemas.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00180/app/schemas.py) | Pydantic 请求/响应模型：批次号、明细项、来源渠道、处理动作、复核意见、四种处置状态 |
| [models.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00180/app/models.py) | SQLAlchemy 数据模型：QuotaBatch / QuotaDetail / AuditLog / RuleVersion，含唯一约束和索引 |
| [rules.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00180/app/rules.py) | 规则引擎：锁定检测 → 冲突检测 → 需补充类型 → 超额判断 → 可办理，边界互不覆盖 |
| [services.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00180/app/services.py) | 核心服务：幂等键判重、明细逐一评估、审计写入、汇总响应组装 |
| [main.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00180/app/main.py) | FastAPI 入口：`POST /api/v1/quota/batch`、`GET /batch/{batch_no}`、`GET /audit/{batch_no}` |
| [test_api.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00180/tests/test_api.py) | 30 个验收测试 |

## 核心设计

### 四种处置与风险标签
- **processable** → `normal`：可办理
- **needs_supplement** → `warning`：需补充（超额>20% 或 storage/api_calls 类型）
- **locked** → `high_risk`：已锁定（租户ID匹配 `LOCKED-*` 模式）
- **failed** → `conflict`：失败解释（跨批次同租户同配额键冲突）

### 边界隔离优先级
评估链严格按 **锁定 → 冲突 → 需补充 → 超额 → 可办理** 执行，首个命中的规则独占结果，不会互相覆盖。

### 幂等性
以 `batch_no` 为唯一键，重复请求直接返回首次结果（包括 action 字段也不被篡改），不产生额外审计记录。

### 审计闭环
每次明细评估和批次完成均写入 AuditLog，包含操作人、规则版本、动作描述和时间戳，可通过 `/audit/{batch_no}` 独立查询。

## 验收结果（30/30 通过）

| 验收类别 | 测试数 | 验证内容 |
|----------|--------|----------|
| 正常记录 | 4 | 可办理处置、汇总数量=明细合计、审计条目完整、按批次号查询 |
| 缺字段 | 11 | 422 校验：缺 batch_no/details/source_channel/action/operator/tenant_id、空列表、零值/负值、非法渠道 |
| 规则冲突 | 6 | 锁定租户、需补充类型、超额触发、跨批次冲突、锁定不受冲突覆盖、边界场景互不覆盖 |
| 重复处理 | 4 | 同请求同结果、汇总稳定、审计不重复、不同 action 仍幂等 |
| 汇总与日志 | 5 | 各处置合计=总数、风险标签与处置一一对应、审计内容完整（操作人+规则版本+detail_id）、审计API端点、不存在的批次返回404 |
